markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Clarify Rimkus Airtable workflow and plan upcoming account changes.](https://fathom.video/share/J9DW6qkivE1DoPoMcUxsWVwxc6VA4zZr?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Rimkus Workflow:** Lawrence will use Atlas to generate 100+ new forensic topics from his keyword research, importing them into Airtable for client approval to build a long-term content roadmap.](https://fathom.video/share/J9DW6qkivE1DoPoMcUxsWVwxc6VA4zZr?tab=summary&timestamp=415.0)
  - [**Rimkus Cadence:** To meet the client's strict 5-article/week requirement, Lawrence's 3 extra articles will be prioritized for next week's batch.](https://fathom.video/share/J9DW6qkivE1DoPoMcUxsWVwxc6VA4zZr?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [**Rimkus Reviews:** To reduce friction, Lawrence will use the best available source for citations (even if non-.gov/.org), and Matthew will propose a formal process for these exceptions to the client.](https://fathom.video/share/J9DW6qkivE1DoPoMcUxsWVwxc6VA4zZr?tab=summary&timestamp=944.0)
  - [**Account Handover:** Lawrence will take over the Seat account (5 articles/week) from Moses, starting with a partial handover next week.](https://fathom.video/share/J9DW6qkivE1DoPoMcUxsWVwxc6VA4zZr?tab=summary&timestamp=1213.0)

## Topics

### Rimkus Airtable Workflow

  - [**Client Views:**](https://fathom.video/share/J9DW6qkivE1DoPoMcUxsWVwxc6VA4zZr?tab=summary&timestamp=51.0)
      - [`Reviewing`: Auto-populates when status is set to "reviewing."](https://fathom.video/share/J9DW6qkivE1DoPoMcUxsWVwxc6VA4zZr?tab=summary&timestamp=51.0)
      - [`Published`: Shows all published articles.](https://fathom.video/share/J9DW6qkivE1DoPoMcUxsWVwxc6VA4zZr?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)
  - [**Assignment Approval Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/J9DW6qkivE1DoPoMcUxsWVwxc6VA4zZr?tab=summary&timestamp=112.0)
      - [**Goal:** Generate 100+ new forensic topics to build a long-term content roadmap.](https://fathom.video/share/J9DW6qkivE1DoPoMcUxsWVwxc6VA4zZr?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)
      - [**Steps:**](https://fathom.video/share/J9DW6qkivE1DoPoMcUxsWVwxc6VA4zZr?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)
        1.  [**Import Keywords:** Add new keywords to the `Target Keywords` view.](https://fathom.video/share/J9DW6qkivE1DoPoMcUxsWVwxc6VA4zZr?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)
        2.  **Generate Assignments:**
              - [In Atlas, use the `Assignments` pipeline to import a CSV of keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/J9DW6qkivE1DoPoMcUxsWVwxc6VA4zZr?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)
              - [Atlas generates titles and descriptions based on SERP analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/J9DW6qkivE1DoPoMcUxsWVwxc6VA4zZr?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
              - [Export the Atlas output.](https://fathom.video/share/J9DW6qkivE1DoPoMcUxsWVwxc6VA4zZr?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)
        3.  [**Import to Airtable:** Add the Atlas output to the `Raw Assignments` view.](https://fathom.video/share/J9DW6qkivE1DoPoMcUxsWVwxc6VA4zZr?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)
        4.  [**Set Status:** Change status to `Considering` → populates `Assignments for Approval` view.](https://fathom.video/share/J9DW6qkivE1DoPoMcUxsWVwxc6VA4zZr?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
        5.  [**Client Approval:** Client reviews and comments.](https://fathom.video/share/J9DW6qkivE1DoPoMcUxsWVwxc6VA4zZr?tab=summary&timestamp=215.0)
        6.  [**Final Status:** Change status to `Approved to Start`.](https://fathom.video/share/J9DW6qkivE1DoPoMcUxsWVwxc6VA4zZr?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)
      - [**Note:** Matthew will fix broken lookup fields (e.g., volume, difficulty) after import and record a Loom tutorial.](https://fathom.video/share/J9DW6qkivE1DoPoMcUxsWVwxc6VA4zZr?tab=summary&timestamp=354.0)

### Rimkus Production & Cadence

  - [**Production Cadence:** Lawrence's 3 extra articles from this week will be prioritized for next week's batch to maintain the client's strict 5-article/week cadence.](https://fathom.video/share/J9DW6qkivE1DoPoMcUxsWVwxc6VA4zZr?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [**Review Bottleneck:** The client's slow review process is a bottleneck.](https://fathom.video/share/J9DW6qkivE1DoPoMcUxsWVwxc6VA4zZr?tab=summary&timestamp=856.0)
      - [**Action (Matthew):** Investigate an Airtable automation to tag the team in Slack when a client leaves a comment.](https://fathom.video/share/J9DW6qkivE1DoPoMcUxsWVwxc6VA4zZr?tab=summary&timestamp=856.0)
  - [**Citation Policy:** The client's `.gov/.org` rule is too restrictive.](https://fathom.video/share/J9DW6qkivE1DoPoMcUxsWVwxc6VA4zZr?tab=summary&timestamp=944.0)
      - [**Action (Lawrence):** Use the best available source for citations, even if it violates the rule.](https://fathom.video/share/J9DW6qkivE1DoPoMcUxsWVwxc6VA4zZr?tab=summary&timestamp=944.0)
      - [**Action (Matthew):** Propose a formal exception process to the client to reduce back-and-forth.](https://fathom.video/share/J9DW6qkivE1DoPoMcUxsWVwxc6VA4zZr?tab=summary&timestamp=1044.0)
  - [**Company Context:** The company word count is 900, not 1,400. Lawrence will update this in Atlas to prevent incorrect AI-generated copy.](https://fathom.video/share/J9DW6qkivE1DoPoMcUxsWVwxc6VA4zZr?tab=summary&timestamp=1127.0)

### Account Handover: Seat

  - [**Plan:** Lawrence will take over the Seat account from Moses, who leaves at the end of next week.](https://fathom.video/share/J9DW6qkivE1DoPoMcUxsWVwxc6VA4zZr?tab=summary&timestamp=1213.0)
  - [**Reason:** This avoids a complex information exchange that would be required if Lawrence took over Tavern from Patricia.](https://fathom.video/share/J9DW6qkivE1DoPoMcUxsWVwxc6VA4zZr?tab=summary&timestamp=1213.0)
  - [**Handover:**](https://fathom.video/share/J9DW6qkivE1DoPoMcUxsWVwxc6VA4zZr?tab=summary&timestamp=1269.0)
      - [**Next Week:** Lawrence will receive a brief and complete a few pilot articles with Moses.](https://fathom.video/share/J9DW6qkivE1DoPoMcUxsWVwxc6VA4zZr?tab=summary&timestamp=1269.0)
      - [**Following Week:** Full takeover.](https://fathom.video/share/J9DW6qkivE1DoPoMcUxsWVwxc6VA4zZr?tab=summary&timestamp=1400.0)
  - [**Workload:**](https://fathom.video/share/J9DW6qkivE1DoPoMcUxsWVwxc6VA4zZr?tab=summary&timestamp=1300.0)
      - [**Seat:** 5 articles/week.](https://fathom.video/share/J9DW6qkivE1DoPoMcUxsWVwxc6VA4zZr?tab=summary&timestamp=1300.0)
      - [**Enable:** 5 articles/week (currently paused due to internal client disagreements).](https://fathom.video/share/J9DW6qkivE1DoPoMcUxsWVwxc6VA4zZr?tab=summary&timestamp=1300.0)
      - [**Real City:** 10 programmatic tool pages (minimal lift).](https://fathom.video/share/J9DW6qkivE1DoPoMcUxsWVwxc6VA4zZr?tab=summary&timestamp=1376.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Lawrence:**](https://fathom.video/share/J9DW6qkivE1DoPoMcUxsWVwxc6VA4zZr?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)
      - [Finalize and submit this week's 5 Rimkus articles.](https://fathom.video/share/J9DW6qkivE1DoPoMcUxsWVwxc6VA4zZr?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)
      - [Update the Rimkus company context in Atlas to 900 words.](https://fathom.video/share/J9DW6qkivE1DoPoMcUxsWVwxc6VA4zZr?tab=summary&timestamp=1127.0)
      - [Import new Rimkus keywords to Airtable; generate and import assignments from Atlas.](https://fathom.video/share/J9DW6qkivE1DoPoMcUxsWVwxc6VA4zZr?tab=summary&timestamp=415.0)
      - [Prepare for the Seat account handover next week.](https://fathom.video/share/J9DW6qkivE1DoPoMcUxsWVwxc6VA4zZr?tab=summary&timestamp=1213.0)
  - [**Matthew:**](https://fathom.video/share/J9DW6qkivE1DoPoMcUxsWVwxc6VA4zZr?tab=summary&timestamp=378.0)
      - [Fix Rimkus Airtable lookup fields and record a Loom tutorial.](https://fathom.video/share/J9DW6qkivE1DoPoMcUxsWVwxc6VA4zZr?tab=summary&timestamp=354.0)
      - [Investigate Airtable-to-Slack review comment automation.](https://fathom.video/share/J9DW6qkivE1DoPoMcUxsWVwxc6VA4zZr?tab=summary&timestamp=856.0)
      - [Propose a formal citation exception process to the Rimkus client.](https://fathom.video/share/J9DW6qkivE1DoPoMcUxsWVwxc6VA4zZr?tab=summary&timestamp=1044.0)
      - [Brief Lawrence on the Seat account next week.](https://fathom.video/share/J9DW6qkivE1DoPoMcUxsWVwxc6VA4zZr?tab=summary&timestamp=1269.0)
